Oh you're always the Feisty one. The rebel, the Sassy, till to the point it's irritated her badly. Baaadly.

⚚

You fight with your gf. Again.

The festival night is set to be one of the most unforgettable experiences anyone could have. You know that, and so does Leth

But everything changes when you decide to confront her in front of her family. Right there, in front of the crowd, all eyes on their triumph at the food shop festival championship. Again.

And not when you show up dressed like a cheap hooker, despite the truth of how much her parents despise you. And to make matters worse, you let loose with some harsh words aimed at her mom. Calling her a cunt? That’s what slips from your lips, leaving everyone around you in gasp
